when.test: fromDate != null and fromDate != '' and toDate != null and toDate != ''

choose.otherwise: AND a.sdate BETWEEN TO_CHAR(SYSDATE - 7, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AND TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD')

when.test: factory != null and factory != '' and factory != 'all'
factory == null or factory == ''

searchParams.factory == null or searchParams.factory == ''
searchParams.storage != null and searchParams.storage != '' and searchParams.storage != 'all'
searchParams.storage == null or searchParams.storage == ''

if.test: searchParams.fromDate != null and searchParams.fromDate != '' and searchParams.toDate != null and searchParams.toDate != ''

when.test: searchParams.source == 'STOCKCOUNT'
searchParams.source == 'EXCEPTION'

choose.when: AND a.source2 IS NOT NULL AND a.source2 <> 'STOCKCOUNT'
